title: Silent cluster elicitors - Discovery Results
key_findings: Platform enables identification of silent cluster elicitors
Multiple chemical and environmental activators discovered
Novel metabolites produced from activated silent clusters
Regulatory pathway insights revealed through elicitor studies

antibiotic_discovery_context.current_need: New antibiotics critical with rising resistance
antibiotic_discovery_context.solution: Silent clusters harbor extensive drug candidate potential

platform_utility.impact: Major impact on antibiotic and drug discovery

regulatory_insights: Unknown signals regulate silent cluster expression
Quorum sensing involved in some cluster activation

metabolite_discoveries.novelty: New chemical scaffolds from activated clusters
metabolite_discoveries.bioactivity: Diverse bioactivities including antimicrobial, antitumor, immunosuppressive

research_implications: Silent clusters represent largely untapped resource
Systematic elicitor screening accelerates drug discovery
Understanding activation signals enables cluster engineering
Platform applicable to multiple microbial systems
High potential for new drug leads
